definition:
Ἡρῴδης (Rec. -ώδης), -ου, ὁ 
 Herod; 
  1. Herod the Great: Mat.2:1-23, Act.23:35. 
   2. Herod Antipas (ὁ τετραάρχης, Mat.14:1): Mat.14:1, 3 14:6, Mrk.6:1-56, Mrk.8:15, Luk.1:5 3:1, 19 8:3 9:7, 9 13:31, 23, Act.4:27 13:1. 
   3. Herod Agrippa I: Act.12:1, 6 12:11, 19 12:21 (cf. Ἀγρίππας (II)).†
 (AS)
